note: Banner V11 corrected: lottery pool widened to all addresses with at least 1 block since genesis (was 30-block window). Exclusion strengthened: any block-reward winner in last 30 blocks is excluded (was only past lottery winners). Lottery frequency change at block 10,000 made explicit (2-of-3 → 1-of-3 alongside PoPC Model A/B + dynamic fees). V11 components activate INDEPENDENTLY at block 7,000 — fork is not bundled atomically; components that fail gates defer to 8,000+. Memory-Lock note added (not part of V11). Hard reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
